# US Census Bureau API — Data Agreement

## Provider
U.S. Census Bureau, Department of Commerce

## URL
https://api.census.gov/

## Terms of Service URL
https://api.census.gov/data/terms_of_service.html

## License
Public Domain (US government data)

## Data We Collect
Demographic and economic data including population estimates, American Community Survey (ACS) data, economic census data, and geographic reference data via the Census Bureau API.

## How We Use It
Demographic and economic context signal in DRM3 products. Census data enriches geographic analysis with population, income, industry, and economic metrics.

## Commercial Use
Yes. Public domain data with no restrictions on commercial use.

## Redistribution
Yes. Public domain data may be freely redistributed in any form.

## Attribution Required
No. Public domain data has no enforceable attribution requirement. Best practice: cite "U.S. Census Bureau" as the data source.

## Rate Limits
- API key required (free, obtained via registration)
- 500 requests per day without a key, unlimited with a key (subject to fair use)
- No documented hard rate limit per second, but reasonable use expected

## Key Restrictions
- Must register for a free API key for production use
- Do not misrepresent Census data or present modified data as official Census statistics
- Some datasets have specific suppression rules for small populations to protect privacy

## Last Reviewed
2026-04-02
